summary: GH-101 spec is approved for a minimal sample read package selection contract. The spec keeps scope limited to marking the existing reserved-domain read package as the first low-risk sample, binding it to the existing redacted fixture, and documenting consumer boundaries. It explicitly excludes schema changes, fixture payload changes, validator expansion, package lock changes, Core fixture consumption, runtime execution, and write behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: Spec review consumed `.loom/specs/GH-101/spec.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-101/plan.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-101/implementation-contract.md`, and `.loom/specs/GH-101/task-carrier.md`; `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-101 --json` and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-101 --json` passed.
follow_ups: GH-102 must provide the Core consumption fixture boundary before Core fixture consumption can be claimed.
GH-103 must document deferred write guardrail behavior before parent FR #89 can close.
